---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea (read the scope notes first)
labels: enhancement
---

> **Before opening:** TinyReplay is intentionally small and session-replay only.
> Several things are explicit non-goals (analytics, heatmaps, auth/teams,
> Postgres/Redis, real-time, mobile SDKs, plugins…). See
> [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#scope). Out-of-scope requests will be
> closed.

**Problem**
What are you trying to do that you can't today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Why it's in scope**
How this fits "session replay only".
